import { PLAN_OPTIONS, formatDisplayDate, getPlanEndDate } from "../utils/membership"; import { getCustomerInitials } from "../utils/customerPhoto"; export const emptyCustomerForm = { fullName: "", phone: "", age: "", plan: PLAN_OPTIONS[0], amountPaid: "", planStart: "", planEnd: "", lastAttended: "", photo: "" }; export function normalizeCustomerForm(customer) { if (!customer) { return emptyCustomerForm; } return { fullName: customer.fullName || "", phone: customer.phone || "", age: customer.age ? String(customer.age) : "", plan: customer.plan || PLAN_OPTIONS[0], amountPaid: customer.amountPaid === 0 || customer.amountPaid ? String(customer.amountPaid) : "", planStart: customer.planStart || "", planEnd: customer.planEnd || "", lastAttended: customer.lastAttended || "", photo: customer.photo || "" }; } export default function CustomerForm({ eyebrow, title, description, form, error, saving, submitLabel, savingLabel, onSubmit, onChange, onPhotoChange, secondaryAction, secondaryLabel, previewStartDate, previewNote = "Preview the selected plan before saving." }) { const previewEndDate = getPlanEndDate(previewStartDate, form.plan); const updateField = (key, value) => { onChange(key, value); }; return (
{eyebrow}

{title}

{description}

Member details

{error ?
{error}
: null}
{form.photo ? ( ) : ( {getCustomerInitials(form.fullName)} )}

Optional. Use a clear photo under 1 MB.

{form.photo ? ( ) : null}
{secondaryAction ? ( ) : null}

Membership preview

Selected plan {form.plan}
Starts on {formatDisplayDate(previewStartDate)}
Expected end date {formatDisplayDate(previewEndDate)}

{previewNote}

); }
